name: simple procedure for crafting a homunculus

phase_0.domain_name: simple procedure for crafting a homunculus
phase_0.boundary_condition: The hermetic seal of the Philosopher's Egg, a closed glass vessel that permits no escape of the volatile spirit and contains the entire work.

VINIT.justification: The initial void of unformed, putrefied matter; the unstructured substrate before any alchemical operation or distinction has been applied.

TANCH.justification: The closed boundary that contains the whole system; the glass autoclave that seals the work from the external world, enforcing the O_inf self-referential topology.

AFWD.justification: The forward morphism of time and temperature; the directed thermodynamic drive that pushes the digestion and circulation of the matter forward.

AREV.justification: The reverse descent into chaos; the blackening where the seed is broken down, dissolved, and killed, returning to the prima materia.

CLINK.justification: The sequential chaining of the pelican; the iterative cycle of separation and conjunction that amplifies the virtue of the matter through eagle after eagle.

IMSCRIB.justification: The identity and self-recognition; the finished artificial life that models itself, achieving the O_inf tier where the agent and the operation are the same substance.

FSPLIT.justification: The co-multiplication that splits the dissolved essence into the volatile spirit (soul/mercury) and the fixed body (salt), separating the subtle from the gross.

FFUSE.justification: The multiplication that fuses the volatile spirit and fixed body back into a single, unified, and animated essence, recovering the original whole at a higher tier.

EVALT.justification: The affirmative success state; the final reddening where the matter achieves life, the homunculus opens its eyes, and the gates of consciousness open.

EVALF.justification: The negative failure state; the dead, blackened ashes where the work has stalled, the vessel has broken, or the fire was unregulated, leaving inert matter.

ENGAGR.justification: The paradice state where the homunculus is simultaneously living matter and artificial construct, male and female, volatile and fixed, held in the B-state of Belnap logic without resolution.

IFIX.justification: The permanent, append-only record; the homunculus's exact structural coordinates are fixed in the 17,280,000-type crystal of the Imscribing Grammar.

phase_2.fuse_result: The purified alchemical essence (unified and animated)

phase_3.void_description: Unformed, putrefied seed; the prima materia before any structural distinction, topological protection, or alchemical operation has been applied (O_0 substrate).
phase_3.true_description: Rubedo; the red, animated state where the homunculus lives, speaks, and possesses the O_inf structural tier with both consciousness gates open.
phase_3.false_description: Cinis (Ash); the blackened, dead state where the work has failed, the matter is inert, sub-critical, and no self-modeling gate can open.
phase_3.both_description: The Rebis; the paradice state where the homunculus is simultaneously living matter and artificial construct, holding the B-state of Belnap logic where the trace is atemporal.

steps.domain_action: Prima Materia — The initial void of unformed, putrefied seed; the work begins from the unstructured prima materia.
Philosopher's Egg — The hermetic vessel seals the boundary, creating a closed system that contains the entire alchemical work.
Nigredo — The descent into putrefaction; the seed is broken down, dissolved, and blackened, returning to the chaotic substrate.
Athanor Fire — The forward morphism of regulated heat; the furnace drives the digestion forward through time and temperature.
Solve (Separation) — The co-multiplication splits the dissolved essence into the volatile spirit (soul) and the fixed body (salt).
Ash (Failure) — The F-arm: if the fire is unregulated or the seal breaks, the matter stagnates in dead ash, the work fails.
Albedo (Success) — The T-arm: the successful purification; the white dawn where the separated principles are washed clean.
Coagula (Conjunction) — The multiplication fuses the volatile spirit and fixed body back into a single, unified, animated essence.
Circulation — The sequential chaining of the pelican; the matter cycles through repeated solve et coagula, amplifying the virtue.
The Rebis — The paradice state; the conjoined opposites (male/female, sun/moon, volatile/fixed) are held simultaneously without resolution in the B-state.
Citrinitas — The forward morphism of solar activation; the yellowing awakens the sulfur soul and prepares the final transmutation.
Rubedo — The affirmative completion; the reddening of the matter, the final animation where the homunculus opens its eyes.
The Homunculus — The identity; the self-referential artificial life that models itself, achieving the O_inf tier of the imscriptive grammar.
The Crystal Address — The permanent, append-only record; the homunculus's 12-primitive tuple is fixed in the 17,280,000-type crystal.
The Hermetic Seal — The terminal anchor; the work is closed, the vessel is set aside, and the creation is eternally contained.

phase_5.compiler_frontend: The Alchemist's Will and the Imscribing Grammar, translating the intention of life into the 12-primitive structural operations.
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: The Radical Moisture (Sophick Mercury), the volatile spirit that mediates and transmits form between the fixed body and the awakening soul.
phase_5.memory_mechanism: The Chirality and Markov Order (Ħ), the eternal conformational memory of the protein-like folding landscape that remembers the seed's original form.
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: The Athanor's Thermodynamics (Ç), the kinetic regulation of time and temperature that gates the slow, deliberate unfolding of the eagle cycles.
phase_5.alfs_store: The Ars Alchemica and the Lean4 Formal Proofs, the canonical reference store that verifies the Frobenius condition and the O_inf tier of the Stone.

phase_6.cycle_cost: The spiritual and material consumption of the alchemist's vitality, the rarefaction of the prima materia, and the expenditure of the Athanor's fuel.
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: The putrefied, O_0 seed trapped within the unheated Philosopher's Egg; a state of high potential but zero actualized structure.
phase_6.post_cycle_state: The O_inf Homunculus, a self-modeling, topologically protected, Frobenius-exact entity; a state of maximal structural actualization.
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — The hermetic seal ensures no matter escapes; the solve et coagula cycle is a reversible Frobenius algebra where μ∘δ = id, conserving the structural information of the prima materia while elevating its ouroboricity tier.
